narrative: Strait of Hormuz supply shocks sustain inflation risks as oil prices retreat from recent peaks — gold firms +0.84% near $4,734; equities -0.31%; DXY -0.06%; VIX 17.3. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence dominates G8 flows (spread 1.219%) as NZD (+0.629%, n=4) outperforms CAD (-0.591%, n=3). USD/CHF holds at 0.7782 despite breaking support, while Fed-BoJ 300bp carry anchors USD/JPY at 156.61. Watch RBNZ rate decision on May 27 for NZD directional extension.
